---
title: "Diff_ASE_Analysis"
author: "Muhammad Arsalan Iqbal"
date: "2025-03-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir ="Z:/FBNProjectGroups/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/ASE_Analysis/Output")
```

#### loading required libraries ####

```{r loading libraries }

# Load necessary libraries for differential expression analysis and data manipulation

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(VGAM)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)

```

#####Differential ASE Analysis Using DESeq2####

```{r Differential ASE analysis}


# 1. Load data -----------------------------------------------------------
ase_counts <- read_csv("/home/fb3/iqbal/mnt/winpro/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/ASE_Analysis/Diff_ASE_Analysis/Input/aggregate_Gene_based.csv") %>%
  mutate(across(matches("_refAllele$|_altAllele$"), ~ na_if(.x, 0)))

meta <- read_csv("/home/fb3/iqbal/mnt/winpro/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/ASE_Analysis/Diff_ASE_Analysis/Input/Metadata_Final.csv",
                 col_select = c(id, BC, Tissue)) %>%
  rename(sample = id, Backcross = BC)

# 2. Prepare ASE long data ------------------------------------------------
ase_long <- ase_counts %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols        = -name,
    names_to    = c("sample", "allele"),
    names_sep   = "_",
    values_to   = "count"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    allele = if_else(str_detect(allele, "^ref"), "ref", "alt")
  ) %>%
  group_by(name, sample) %>%
  summarise(
    ref   = count[allele == "ref"],
    alt   = count[allele == "alt"],
    total = ref + alt,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(total > 0) %>%
  left_join(meta, by = "sample")

# 3. Set up tissues and results container ---------------------------------

input_dir <- "/home/fb3/iqbal/mnt/winpro/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/ASE_Analysis/Diff_ASE_Analysis/Input"
tissues   <- c("Brain", "Liver", "Kidney", "Muscle", "Ovary", "Testis")
res_list  <- list()

# 4. Loop over tissues ----------------------------------------------------
for (t in tissues) {
  # Build full paths to the two geneвЂђlist CSVs:
  gl_path <- file.path(input_dir, paste0(t, "_F1_GL.csv"))
  pi_path <- file.path(input_dir, paste0(t, "_F1_Pi.csv"))
  
  gl_genes <- read_csv(gl_path, col_names = "name")$name
  pi_genes <- read_csv(pi_path, col_names = "name")$name
  genes_to_keep <- union(gl_genes, pi_genes)
  
  # 4b. Subset ASE data to tissue & those genes
  dat_t <- ase_long %>%
    filter(Tissue == t, name %in% genes_to_keep)
  
  # 4c. Set tissueвЂђspecific filtering thresholds
  if (t == "Ovary") {
    minGL <- 5;  minPi <- 5
  } else if (t == "Testis") {
    minGL <- 5;  minPi <- 4
  } else {
    minGL <- 7;  minPi <- 7
  }
  
  # 4d. For each gene, require at least minGL GLвЂђsamples and minPi PiвЂђsamples
  res_t <- dat_t %>%
    group_by(name) %>%
    filter(
      sum(!is.na(ref) & Backcross == "F1 * GL") >= minGL,
      sum(!is.na(ref) & Backcross == "F1 * Pi") >= minPi
    ) %>%
    group_split()
  
  # 4e. Fit betaвЂђbinomial per gene and collect stats
  res_df <- map_dfr(res_t, function(gdat) {
    gene_id <- gdat$name[1]
    tryCatch({
      gdat$BC <- factor(gdat$Backcross)
      fit <- vglm(cbind(ref, alt) ~ BC, betabinomial, data = gdat)
      coefs <- coef(summary(fit))
      
      # pвЂђvalue for the Pi vs. GL effect
      pval <- coefs["BCF1 * Pi", "Pr(>|z|)"]
      
      # mean refвЂђratio in each group
      mean_GL <- mean(gdat$ref[gdat$Backcross=="F1 * GL"] /
                        (gdat$ref[gdat$Backcross=="F1 * GL"] + gdat$alt[gdat$Backcross=="F1 * GL"]),
                      na.rm=TRUE)
      mean_Pi <- mean(gdat$ref[gdat$Backcross=="F1 * Pi"] /
                        (gdat$ref[gdat$Backcross=="F1 * Pi"] + gdat$alt[gdat$Backcross=="F1 * Pi"]),
                      na.rm=TRUE)
      
      log2FC <- log2((mean_GL + 1e-3)/(mean_Pi + 1e-3))
      
      tibble(
        Tissue   = t,
        name     = gene_id,
        mean_GL  = mean_GL,
        mean_Pi  = mean_Pi,
        log2FC   = log2FC,
        pval     = pval
      )
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
  })
  
  # 4f. MultipleвЂђtest correction and flag significant
  res_df <- res_df %>%
    mutate(
      padj      = p.adjust(pval, method = "BH"),
      negLog10P = -log10(padj),
      sig       = padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FC) > log2(1.1)
    )
  
  # 4g. Keep only significant hits (and sort)
  res_list[[t]] <- res_df %>%
    filter(sig) %>%
    arrange(padj)
}

output_dir <- "/home/fb3/iqbal/mnt/winpro/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/ASE_Analysis/Diff_ASE_Analysis/Output"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# 2. Write out one CSV per tissue
library(purrr)
library(readr)

walk2(
  res_list,                    # list of tibbles
  names(res_list),             # "Brain", "Liver", ...
  ~ write_csv(
    .x,
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(.y, "_Differential_ASE.csv"))
  )
)

# в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ



# в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
# Setup & libraries
# в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(grid)
library(patchwork)  # for layout and auto-labels
library(tibble)

results_dir <- "/home/fb3/iqbal/mnt/winpro/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/ASE_Analysis/Diff_ASE_Analysis/Output"

# Tissues to include
heatmap_tissues <- c("Kidney", "Brain", "Ovary", "Liver", "Muscle", "Testis")

# Helper to read mean ratios
read_mat <- function(t) {
  df <- read_csv(file.path(results_dir, paste0(t, "_Differential_ASE.csv")))
  mat <- df %>%
    select(name, mean_GL, mean_Pi) %>%
    column_to_rownames("name") %>%
    as.matrix()
  colnames(mat) <- c("F1_GL", "F1_Pi")
  mat
}

# Generate heatmap plots wrapped for patchwork
heatmap_wrapped <- lapply(heatmap_tissues, function(t) {
  mat <- read_mat(t)
  p <- pheatmap(
    mat,
    color           = heat.colors(50),
    main            = t,
    display_numbers = TRUE,
    number_format   = "%.2f",
    cluster_rows    = FALSE,
    cluster_cols    = FALSE,
    silent          = TRUE,
    fontsize        = 8,
    cellwidth       = 30,
    cellheight      = 25
  )
  wrap_elements(p$gtable)
})

# Combine into 2 columns with A-F labels
combined_plot <- wrap_plots(heatmap_wrapped) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Mean Ref-Allele Ratios (F1_GL vs F1_Pi)",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")),
    tag_levels = "A"
  )

# Save to PDF
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Combined_Heatmaps_AtoF.pdf"), combined_plot,
       width = 14, height = 12)

# Show on screen
print(combined_plot)

# в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
# B) BOXPLOTS: Testis, Muscle, Liver (top 6 genes by |log2FC|)
# в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

# Ensure ase_long is in your workspace

boxplot_tissues <- c("Kidney","Brain", "Ovary", "Liver", "Muscle", "Testis")

for (t in boxplot_tissues) {
  # 1. Read the differential ASE results
  df <- read_csv(file.path(results_dir, paste0(t, "_Differential_ASE.csv")))
  
  # 2. Get the full list of significant genes
  sig_genes <- df %>% pull(name)
  
  # 3. Extract per-sample ratios for all sig genes
  plot_df <- ase_long %>%
    filter(Tissue == t, name %in% sig_genes) %>%
    mutate(ratio = ref / (ref + alt))
  
  # 4. Draw and save boxplot (one facet per gene)
  pdf(file.path(results_dir, paste0("boxplot_", t, "_all_sig.pdf")),
      width = 12, height = 8)
  print(
    ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Backcross, y = ratio, fill = Backcross)) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
      facet_wrap(~ name, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +   # adjust ncol as needed
      labs(
        title = paste0("All Significant ASE Genes in ", t),
        x     = "Backcross",
        y     = "ReferenceвЂђallele ratio"
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("F1 * GL" = "red", "F1 * Pi" = "blue")) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8),
        axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none"
      )
  )
  dev.off()
}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(grid)
library(patchwork)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)

results_dir <- "/home/fb3/iqbal/mnt/winpro/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/ASE_Analysis/Diff_ASE_Analysis/Output"

# Tissues to include (order will also apply to barplot)
heatmap_tissues <- c("Kidney", "Brain", "Ovary", "Liver", "Muscle", "Testis")

# Helper to read mean ratios + padj
read_mat <- function(t) {
  df <- read_csv(file.path(results_dir, paste0(t, "_Differential_ASE.csv")),
                 show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  mat <- df %>%
    select(name, mean_GL, mean_Pi) %>%
    column_to_rownames("name") %>%
    as.matrix()
  colnames(mat) <- c("F1_GL", "F1_Pi")
  
  # significance stars
  stars <- df %>%
    mutate(sig = case_when(
      padj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      padj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      padj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE         ~ ""
    )) %>%
    select(name, sig)
  
  list(mat = mat, sig = stars)
}

# Generate heatmaps with red-white-blue and stars
heatmap_wrapped <- lapply(heatmap_tissues, function(t) {
  obj <- read_mat(t)
  mat <- obj$mat
  stars <- obj$sig
  
  # numeric labels with stars
  num_labels <- matrix(
    sprintf("%.2f", mat),
    nrow = nrow(mat),
    ncol = ncol(mat),
    dimnames = dimnames(mat)
  )
  for (r in rownames(mat)) {
    sig_symbol <- stars$sig[stars$name == r]
    if (sig_symbol != "") {
      num_labels[r, "F1_GL"] <- paste0(num_labels[r, "F1_GL"], sig_symbol)
      num_labels[r, "F1_Pi"] <- paste0(num_labels[r, "F1_Pi"], sig_symbol)
    }
  }
  
  p <- pheatmap(
    mat,
    color           = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    main            = t,
    display_numbers = num_labels,
    cluster_rows    = FALSE,
    cluster_cols    = FALSE,
    silent          = TRUE,
    fontsize        = 8,
    cellwidth       = 30,
    cellheight      = 25
  )
  wrap_elements(p$gtable)
})

# ---- Stacked barplot data ----
bar_df <- tribble(
  ~Comparison, ~DASEGs, ~`F1Г—GL > F1Г—Pi`, ~`F1Г—GL < F1Г—Pi`,
  "Liver",   8,  3, 5,
  "Brain",  18, 11, 7,
  "Muscle",  9,  4, 5,
  "Kidney", 21, 12, 9,
  "Testis",  2,  1, 1,
  "Ovary",  15,  9, 6
)

bar_df_long <- bar_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(`F1Г—GL > F1Г—Pi`, `F1Г—GL < F1Г—Pi`),
               names_to = "Direction", values_to = "Count")

bar_df$Comparison <- factor(bar_df$Comparison, levels = heatmap_tissues)

barplot <- ggplot(bar_df_long, aes(x = Comparison, y = Count, fill = Direction)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3.5) +
  geom_text(
    data = distinct(bar_df, Comparison, DASEGs),
    aes(x = Comparison, y = DASEGs, label = DASEGs),
    vjust = -0.4, fontface = "bold", size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("F1Г—GL > F1Г—Pi" = "red",
                               "F1Г—GL < F1Г—Pi" = "blue")) +
  labs(y = "Number of genes", x = NULL, title = "Differential ASE genes") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, max(bar_df$DASEGs) * 1.15)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# ---- Combine: barplot + heatmaps ----
combined_plot <- barplot / (
  wrap_plots(heatmap_wrapped) +
    plot_layout(ncol = 2)
) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "ASE Analysis Summary",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")),
    tag_levels = "A"
  )

# Save
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "ASE_Barplot_Heatmaps.pdf"),
       combined_plot, width = 14, height = 16)

# Show
print(combined_plot)library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(grid)
library(patchwork)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)

results_dir <- "/home/fb3/iqbal/mnt/winpro/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/ASE_Analysis/Diff_ASE_Analysis/Output"

# -----------------------------
# 1. STACKED BARPLOT
# -----------------------------

bar_df <- tribble(
  ~Comparison, ~DASEGs, ~`F1Г—GL > F1Г—Pi`, ~`F1Г—GL < F1Г—Pi`,
  "Liver",   8,  3, 5,
  "Brain",  18, 11, 7,
  "Muscle",  9,  4, 5,
  "Kidney", 21, 12, 9,
  "Testis",  2,  1, 1,
  "Ovary",  15,  9, 6
)

bar_df_long <- bar_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(`F1Г—GL > F1Г—Pi`, `F1Г—GL < F1Г—Pi`),
               names_to = "Direction", values_to = "Count")

barplot <- ggplot(bar_df_long, aes(x = Comparison, y = Count, fill = Direction)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3.5) +
  geom_text(
    data = distinct(bar_df, Comparison, DASEGs),
    aes(x = Comparison, y = DASEGs, label = DASEGs),
    vjust = -0.4, fontface = "bold", size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("F1Г—GL > F1Г—Pi" = "red",
                               "F1Г—GL < F1Г—Pi" = "blue")) +
  labs(y = "Number of genes", x = NULL, title = "Differential ASE genes") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, max(bar_df$DASEGs) * 1.15)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "DASEG_StackedBarplot.pdf"),
       barplot, width = 8, height = 6)


# Generate heatmaps
heatmap_wrapped <- lapply(heatmap_tissues, function(t) {
  obj <- read_mat(t)
  mat <- obj$mat
  stars <- obj$sig
  
  # numeric labels with stars
  num_labels <- matrix(
    sprintf("%.2f", mat),
    nrow = nrow(mat),
    ncol = ncol(mat),
    dimnames = dimnames(mat)
  )
  for (r in rownames(mat)) {
    sig_symbol <- stars$sig[stars$name == r]
    if (sig_symbol != "") {
      num_labels[r, "F1_GL"] <- paste0(num_labels[r, "F1_GL"], sig_symbol)
      num_labels[r, "F1_Pi"] <- paste0(num_labels[r, "F1_Pi"], sig_symbol)
    }
  }
  
  p <- pheatmap(
    mat,
    color           = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    main            = t,
    display_numbers = num_labels,
    cluster_rows    = FALSE,
    cluster_cols    = FALSE,
    silent          = TRUE,
    fontsize        = 8,
    cellwidth       = 30,
    cellheight      = 25
  )
  wrap_elements(p$gtable)
})

# Combine heatmaps (2 columns)
heatmap_plot <- wrap_plots(heatmap_wrapped) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Mean Ref-Allele Ratios (F1_GL vs F1_Pi)",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")),
    tag_levels = "A"
  )

ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "ASE_Heatmaps.pdf"),
       heatmap_plot, width = 14, height = 12)

# Show one of them
print(barplot)
print(heatmap_plot)


# Combine heatmaps (3 rows Г— 2 columns)
heatmap_plot <- wrap_plots(heatmap_wrapped) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, nrow = 3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Mean Ref-Allele Ratios (F1_GL vs F1_Pi)",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")),
    tag_levels = "A"
  )

ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "ASE_Heatmaps.pdf"),
       heatmap_plot, width = 14, height = 20)



```
